title: My Actual Class Schedule (Finally Written Down)

sentences.en: I promised myself last week that I would finally write down my full class schedule, so here it is, hour by hour.
sentences.zh: 我上星期跟自己保證要把完整的課表寫下來，所以就是這篇，一節一節寫。

sentences.en: School starts at eight o'clock sharp, and the clock in our classroom is somehow always five minutes slow.
sentences.zh: 學校八點整開始上課，而我們教室的時鐘不知為何永遠慢五分鐘。

sentences.en: The first class of the morning is science, which lasts a full hour and usually includes at least one small experiment.
sentences.zh: 早上第一堂課是自然課，整整一小時，通常至少會有一個小實驗。

sentences.en: After science comes history, where we are currently learning about events from a few hundred years ago.
sentences.zh: 自然課之後是歷史課，我們現在正在學幾百年前發生的事件。

sentences.en: Our history teacher once said that a thousand small choices add up to change a whole country, which I still think about sometimes.
sentences.zh: 我們歷史老師曾經說，一千個小小的選擇加起來就能改變整個國家，我到現在有時候還會想起這句話。

sentences.en: At exactly ten thirty, we get a short break, and half the class runs straight to the vending machine before it eats their coins.
sentences.zh: 十點半整，我們有一段短暫的下課時間，班上一半的人會直接衝去自動販賣機，趁它還沒把硬幣吃掉之前。

sentences.en: The third class before noon is art, my personal favorite, where the teacher lets us choose any color we want.
sentences.zh: 中午前的第三堂課是美術，我最喜歡的一堂課，老師讓我們自己選喜歡的顏色。

sentences.en: Lunch happens right at noon, and by that point, I am always extremely hungry, no matter how big my breakfast was.
sentences.zh: 午餐正好在中午，到那個時候我總是餓得要命，不管早餐吃了多少都一樣。

sentences.en: The first afternoon class is music, where we are learning to sing a simple song as a whole class.
sentences.zh: 下午第一堂課是音樂課，我們正在學一首簡單的歌，全班一起唱。

sentences.en: At one thirty, we have computer class, and last week the whole computer lab lost power for about a quarter of an hour.
sentences.zh: 下午一點半是電腦課，上星期整間電腦教室停電了大概一刻鐘。

sentences.en: The final class of the day usually ends around three o'clock, though on Wednesdays it ends an hour earlier.
sentences.zh: 一天最後一堂課通常是三點結束，不過星期三會提早一小時結束。

sentences.en: After school, I have about a half hour before I need to walk home, so I usually spend it talking with Bernice.
sentences.zh: 放學後，我大概有半小時可以走回家，我通常會拿這段時間跟 Bernice 聊天。

sentences.en: Bernice's own schedule is almost exactly the same as mine, except her school gives an extra music class on Fridays.
sentences.zh: Bernice 自己的課表跟我幾乎一模一樣，只是她們學校星期五多一堂音樂課。

sentences.en: By the time I get home, it is usually a little past four in the afternoon, and William is already home from his own school.
sentences.zh: 我到家的時候通常已經下午四點多了，William 早就從他自己的學校放學回家了。

sentences.en: Homework time officially starts at five o'clock, though it always seems to actually start closer to five thirty.
sentences.zh: 功課時間正式從五點開始，不過實際上總是要拖到五點半左右才真的開始。

sentences.en: Dinner is at exactly seven, and by nine o'clock, Sophia is already telling everyone it is time to think about bed.
sentences.zh: 晚餐是準時七點，到了九點，Sophia 就已經開始跟大家說該想想要準備睡覺了。

sentences.en: Looking at my whole schedule written out like this, my day feels a lot longer than I usually think it is.
sentences.zh: 把整個課表這樣寫出來看，我的一天感覺比我平常想的還要長很多。

sentences.en: William asked to see my schedule and said his own day is much simpler: school, snacks, and robots, in that exact order.
sentences.zh: William 要求看我的課表，說他自己的一天簡單多了：上學、吃點心，然後機器人，順序就是這樣。

quiz.question: What happened in computer class last week?
options: The whole lab lost power for about a quarter of an hour.
The computers were replaced with new ones.

quiz.question: According to William, what is the order of his simple day?
